title: medicago polycarpa subsp. polymorpha
intro: Medicago polycarpa subsp. polymorpha, also known as polymorphic medic or polymorphic medick, is a sub-species of the Medicago polycarpa plant, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). This perennial herb is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is rich in isoflavones, flavonoids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, such as improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting bone health. Medicinal preparations of Medicago polycarpa subsp. polymorpha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
